title: Rysons Handy Mini Magnetic Kitchen Gadget Thermometer With Stand Room Fridge/Freezer Temperature Gauge Dial Shed
features: Ranges From -20 Degree To +50 Degree Celsius
Great For Checking Temperatures Around The Home, Office Or Vehicle
description: Handy Mini Magnetic Thermometer With Stand (Read from -20 to +50 Celsius) Magnetic Thermometer with free standing. Ideal for the kitchen or other areas in the House. Dial Reads From -20°C To 50°C Black Numbers With Red Pointer. Thermometer with Stand Designed with Clearly Marked Division. This is easy to read and give you the right temperature. Handy Magnetic Thermometer is made with a Convenient stand. Simple to Store and Quickly Find and Read Each Measurement. Reads from -20 to +50 Celsius.
